_comment: EDIT THIS FILE when Anthropic changes API rates or plan prices. Rates are USD per 1,000,000 tokens. A per-user override can live at ~/.cc-gauge/pricing.json and takes precedence over this bundled copy.

fable._note: Fable 5 pricing not published at build time — placeholder, update me.

ratioThresholds._comment: Axis-1 verdict boundaries. underuse: below this the API value is under half the window's sub cost. breakEven: at/above this Anthropic is at a loss (the 'à perte' toggle lights).

projection._comment: Axis 2 calibration. lookbackWeeks: history horizon for the weekday/hour profile. profilePercentile: robustness knob (P75 default; raise toward P90 for a more pessimistic projection).
